options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <blackBoxCellName> # name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -clockFrom
options.description: Specifies the name of the clock input port

options.name: -genConstr
options.description: Specifies the latency to consider in the what-if timing constraints generation

options.name: -init
options.description: Specifies the current clock insertion delay value

options.name: -new
options.description: Specifies the new clock latency value
